ItacPersonItem.Notes: Portrait from Tomasini, Illustrium virorum elogia (1630). Tomasini defines him as father founder of the Accademia degli Stabili. He also provides two emblems and Greek mottoes (translated in Latin). One is a book, with motto `Aristotelis Omnia`; the other is the Gordian knot with motto `Aut ingenio aut vi`. It is not sure whether they were used as emblems within one of the Academies.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
